overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing exploration of a modern industrial facility built into rocky cliffs. The player character moves from an exterior concrete platform into an interior lobby with vending machines and digital displays, navigates through corridors, and exits to an exterior area featuring a crashed aircraft.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior concrete platform at cliffside facility entrance

events.description: player walks through the red industrial gate from exterior into the facility interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the red industrial gate and entering the facility while holding a pistol

entered.detail: large red metal sliding gate serving as the main facility entrance
natural rock formation with sparse vegetation covering the facility entrance
wide concrete exterior platform with yellow safety lines

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an exterior concrete platform beneath a rocky cliff overhang. The player approaches a large red industrial gate, passing through it to enter the facility interior. The environment is sunlit with clear skies visible above the cliff.

scene_state.functional_zone: facility lobby with vending machines and digital displays

events.description: player approaches and examines the digital wall screen displaying red alert imagery

agents.ego_description: walking through the lobby and examining the digital screen while surveying the vending machine area

entered.detail: illuminated glass display case with green bottles and items inside
large wall-mounted display showing red tactical imagery and maps
simple black seating bench against the gray wall
tall gray metal storage unit with multiple compartments

segments.scene_description: Inside the facility lobby, the player moves past a glass vending machine and approaches a digital wall screen displaying red alert graphics. The space features gray metal walls, orange accent panels, black benches, and storage lockers under bright artificial ceiling lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior corridors connecting lobby to exterior exit

events.description: player turns left toward the stairwell and exit corridor
approaching the large exit doorway leading back outside

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow interior corridors past storage areas and vending machines toward the facility exit

entered.detail: open metal shelving units with white and black storage boxes
blue and white automated machine with GUILD branding
opening leading to stairs with orange illuminated walls
exit doorway with red emergency lighting around the frame

segments.scene_description: The player moves through narrow corridors lined with storage shelves and orange wall panels. They pass a GUILD vending machine and approach a stairwell entrance with red emergency lighting, continuing toward the facility exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior concrete courtyard with crashed aircraft wreckage

events.description: player exits the facility into the exterior courtyard revealing the crashed aircraft

agents.ego_description: exiting the facility and moving through the exterior courtyard while observing the crashed aircraft on the cliff

entered.detail: large black aircraft wreckage embedded in the rocky cliff face
low concrete structure with metal shutter doors and warning markings
open concrete courtyard with hexagonal tile patterns and debris

segments.scene_description: The player exits the facility into a wide exterior courtyard. A large crashed aircraft is visible wrecked on the cliff face above. The area features concrete bunker structures with metal shutters under bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit exterior cliffside into a sterile industrial interior before emerging back into a wide open courtyard. It begins on a concrete platform beneath a rocky overhang, moving through a large red industrial gate to transition from the bright daylight into the facility. As the camera enters the lobby, the natural light is replaced by bright artificial ceiling lights reflecting off gray metal walls, orange panels, and digital screens displaying red alerts. The scene then shifts into narrow corridors lined with storage shelves and emergency lighting before the camera pushes forward toward a facility exit. Finally, the environment opens back up into a midday sunlit courtyard featuring concrete bunkers and the wreckage of a large aircraft crashed against the cliff face.
